scripts.build:wasm: bash -lc 'scripts/ensure-emsdk.sh && source ./emsdk/emsdk_env.sh && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/cmake/Modules/Platform/Emscripten.cmake ${CMAKE_ARGS} && cmake --build build --target cp_sat_runtime_site -j'
scripts.build:lib: npm run gen:sat-parameters && tsc && vite build --config vite.lib.config.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:lib && npm run build:site
scripts.dev: npm run build:lib && vite --config vite.site.config.ts dev --host
scripts.pack:lib: npm run build:lib && npm pack --pack-destination build/javascript/lib
